testcase.name: test_cancel_ticket_format_has_required_fields
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_partial_void.py:285: in test_cancel_ticket_format_has_required_fields assert cancel_res.status_code == 200, f"Cancel failed: {cancel_res.text}" E AssertionError: Cancel failed: {"detail":"Esta anulación requiere autorización de gerente"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cancel_sent_item_generates_ticket
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_partial_void.py:352: in test_cancel_sent_item_generates_ticket assert cancel_res.status_code == 200, f"Cancel failed: {cancel_res.text}" E AssertionError: Cancel failed: {"detail":"Esta anulación requiere autorización de gerente"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_express_void_pending_item_no_reason_required
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_partial_void.py:398: in test_express_void_pending_item_no_reason_required assert item["quantity"] == 2, f"Expected qty 2, got {item['quantity']}" E AssertionError: Expected qty 2, got 1.0 E assert 1.0 == 2

testcase.name: test_partial_void_return_to_inventory_flag
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_partial_void.py:440: in test_partial_void_return_to_inventory_flag assert void_res.status_code == 200, f"Partial void failed: {void_res.text}" E AssertionError: Partial void failed: {"detail":"Cantidad a anular debe ser entre 1 y 1.0"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
